sourcePrompt: An M57 "clicker", the handheld firing device for a Claymore mine, small enough to disappear in a fist at about ten centimeters. An olive-drab plastic squeeze-grip detonator shaped like a stubby stapler, with a folding wire safety bail over the lever and a thin firing-wire pigtail with a small connector trailing from one end. Olive-drab plastic, small and purposeful.
handEdit: Math.PI radian rotations converted to intended degrees (createPart rotation is degrees); offline rebake, no model call
